title: EQ - X button, close the screen
scenario: EQ screen close button (X) in upper right corner returns to Device Settings screen on tap
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Tap on the desired Poly device to open Device Settings.
In Device Settings, tap on Audio Settings.
In Audio Settings, tap on Equalizer to open the EQ screen.
Observe the upper right corner of the EQ screen for an X (close) button.
expected: The EQ screen closes and the user is returned to the Device Settings screen.
